issues: LibreOffice emitted a workbookProtection element whose lock flags were all disabled; element presence alone was not active protection.
Google exported explicit landscape metadata on source workbooks that did not declare landscape orientation; symmetric pairwise additions were incidental to the prospective feature under test.
corrections: Treat workbook protection as present only when lockStructure, lockWindows, or lockRevision is truthy.

For pairwise structural comparisons, qualify engine-only feature additions as material only when the frozen source declared that feature; formula, value, error, loss, and source-declared preservation differences remain material.
decisionRule: Discard the pre-correction targeted outputs, rerun all twelve frozen fixtures, and only then run the complete population.
